nl_query: For each active scanner device, show the device name, campus, total scripts scanned this month, number of rescans performed, average OCR confidence of pages scanned, and the timestamp of the last scan, filtering devices with zero scans.
failed_sql: SELECT sd.device_name, au.name AS academic_unit, COUNT(DISTINCT sh.script_id) AS total_scripts_scanned, COUNT(CASE WHEN sh.scan_status = 'RESCAN_NEEDED' THEN 1 END) AS rescans_performed, AVG(sm.extracted_metadata->>'confidence') AS average_ocr_confidence, MAX(sh.scanned_at) AS last_scan_timestamp FROM scanner_device sd JOIN academic_unit au ON au.id = sd.campus_id JOIN scan_history sh ON sh.device_id = sd.id JOIN script_page sm ON sm.script_id = sh.script_id WHERE sh.scanned_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 month' AND sd.is_active = TRUE AND sh.scan_status IN ('NOT_SCANNED', 'SCANNED', 'RESCAN_NEEDED', 'SCAN_FAILED') GROUP BY sd.device_name, au.name, sd.id, sd.campus_id ORDER BY total_scripts_scanned DESC
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): scan_history.scan_status, scan_history.scan_status. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
